title: RobotInfo Function
parameters: index	Integer expression that represents the index of the information to retrieve.
description: The information for each bit of the returned value is shown in the table below:
see_also:
Returns status information for the robot.

CtrlInfo

RobotInfo$

TaskInfo

RobotInfo Function Example

If (RobotInfo(3) And &H1) = &H1 Then

		  Print "Joint 1 is locked"

		Else

		  Print "Joint 1 is free"

		EndIf
examples:
If (RobotInfo(3) And &H1) = &H1 Then
		  Print "Joint 1 is locked"
		Else
		  Print "Joint 1 is free"
		EndIf
